name: Chicken and Sausage with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
3. Add chicken to the skillet and cook, turning occasionally until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
4. Add sausages to the skillet and brown them for about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
5. Return the chicken and sausages to their respective plates.
6. In the same skillet, add rice, green peppers, onion, and garlic; cook until the rice is lightly browned, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes.
7. Stir in red wine and simmer for 2 minutes.
8. Add tomatoes, broth, mushrooms, basil, bay leaf, and sugar to the skillet. Stir to combine.
9. Return chicken and sausages to the skillet. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 35 - 40 minutes until chicken is tender.
10. Remove and discard any fat before serving.
